name: HYPEROSTOSIS CORTICALIS GENERALISATA
definition: GENERALIZED CORTICAL HYPEROSTOSIS = ENDOSTEAL HYPEROSTOSIS extremely uncommon homozygous disorder of intramembranous ossification part of

demographics.Location: skull, mandible, clavicles, ribs, long-bone diaphyses

distribution: skull, mandible, clavicles, ribs, long-bone diaphyses
discriminating_features: distention of subarachnoid space along optic nerve sheaths
symmetrical dense homogeneous endosteal cortical thickening of diaphyses of long bones

MR: distention of subarachnoid space along optic nerve sheaths
Long bones: symmetrical dense homogeneous endosteal cortical thickening of diaphyses of long bones
Skull: thickening of skull, facial bones, mandible
Spine: increased density of the axial skeleton
